Lesson Focus: Introduction to vectors in 2D and 3D; position vectors, displacement vectors, magnitude, and unit vectors.
Practice / Assignment: Basic vector notation, magnitude, unit vector, and vector between two points.

Lesson Focus: Vector addition, subtraction, scalar multiplication, parallel vectors, and simple geometric interpretation.
Practice / Assignment: Short practice set on vector operations and parallel vector conditions.

Lesson Focus: Dot product in component form and geometric form; angles between vectors; perpendicular vectors.
Practice / Assignment: Angle and perpendicularity questions, including unknown parameter problems.

Lesson Focus: Cross product calculation, perpendicular vectors, and area interpretation for triangles and parallelograms.
Practice / Assignment: Cross product calculation and area questions.

Lesson Focus: Vector, parametric, and Cartesian forms of a 3D line; lines through two points; point-on-line checks.
Practice / Assignment: Line equation conversions and point-on-line problems.

Lesson Focus: Relationships between lines: parallel, intersecting, and skew lines. Emphasis on setting up parameters carefully.
Vector and Cartesian equations of a plane; normal vectors; forming a plane from given conditions.
Practice / Assignment: Plane equation problems using a point and normal vector, or three points.

Lesson Focus: Line-plane intersection, angle between lines, angle between a line and a plane, and angle between planes.
Consolidation of vector modelling questions and applied vector problems.
Complex numbers, real and imaginary parts, conjugates, Argand diagrams, modulus, argument, and polar form.
Practice / Assignment: Cartesian-polar conversion and Argand diagram questions.

Textbook Topic: Operations with complex numbers in polar form
Lesson Focus: Multiplication and division of complex numbers in polar form as scaling and rotation.
Practice / Assignment: Operations in polar form and interpretation on the Argand diagram.

Textbook Topic: Powers and roots of complex numbers in polar form
Lesson Focus: De Moivre's theorem, powers, nth roots, and geometric distribution of roots on the Argand diagram.
Practice / Assignment: Powers and roots problems; Chapter 10 review set.

Lesson Focus: Sample spaces, events, complements, unions, intersections, mutually exclusive events, independence, and conditional probability.
Practice / Assignment: Venn diagram, tree diagram, conditional probability, and independence questions.

Lesson Focus: Discrete random variables, probability distribution tables, expected value, variance, and standard deviation.
Practice / Assignment: Distribution table, E(X), E(X^2), Var(X), and standard deviation practice.

Lesson Focus: Continuous random variables, probability density functions, area under a curve, and integration-based probability.
Practice / Assignment: PDF constant, interval probability, and simple CDF-style questions.

Lesson Focus: Binomial conditions, X~B(n,p), exact probability, cumulative probability, complements, mean, and variance.
Practice / Assignment: Binomial exact/cumulative probability and calculator practice.

Lesson Focus: Normal distribution shape, mean and standard deviation, z-scores, normal CDF, inverse normal, and modelling interpretation.
Practice / Assignment: Normal CDF, inverse normal, and unknown mean/standard deviation questions.

Lesson Focus: Introduction to the Exploration: purpose, assessment focus, research question design, and possible topics from vectors, complex numbers, and probability.
Practice / Assignment: Draft two possible Exploration ideas with a research question and relevant mathematics.

Lesson Focus: Cumulative review across vectors, complex numbers, probability distributions, and Exploration planning. Focus on connecting textbook concepts to exam-style questions.
Practice / Assignment: Mixed mini mock and individual weakness checklist.
